events.event_description: Establishment of U.S. diplomatic mission in Morocco at the legation level, with Samuel Rene Gummere presenting credentials as Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: Samuel Rene Gummere, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1905-03-08. Credentials presented: 1906-09-29. Superseded 1909-06-09.

events.event_description: Mission downgraded from Legation/Chargé d'Affaires to a Liaison office, with Maxwell Blake serving as Agent/Consul General (Diplomatic Agent).

evidence.quote: Maxwell Blake, Agent/Consul General. Appointed: 1917-07-20. Credentials presented: 1917-10-11. Superseded 1922-04-11.

events.event_description: U.S. mission elevated to Embassy level upon Moroccan independence, with Cavendish Wells Cannon presenting credentials as the first Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: Cavendish Wells Cannon, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1956-07-21. Credentials presented: 1956-10-06. Relinquished charge 1958-07-01.
